creator: dotzsoh-singapore
caption:
вңЁрҹҺўрҹҺЎрҹҸҜрҹҢҚвңЁ embark on the ultimate adventure to @universal_studios_japan with @kkdaysg this whole month of September with their BUY 1 GET 1 deal happening every Tuesday & Thursday at 12pm! 

Here are some of my favourites and save your time by getting the Express Pass because saving more time means you get to try more rides! вҸ°рҹҺү

рҹҢҹSUPER NINTENDO WORLD 
рҹҢҹMario Kart: KoopaвҖҷs Challengeв„ў
рҹҢҹJurassic Park The Flying Dinosaur
рҹҢҹDespicable Me: Minion Mayhem
рҹҢҹHollywood Dream - The Ride
рҹҢҹJaws
рҹҢҹHarry Potter and the Forbidden Journeyв„ў

Download KKdayвҖҷs app right now & explore the many different deals and discounts you can get from #KKdayTravelQuest from now till 30 September! 
#kkday #kkdaysg #explorewithkkday #travelwithkkday #KKdayTravelQuest #japan #PR #universalstudiosjapan #japan #osaka #USJ #wizardingworldofharrypotter #supernintendoworld

transcription.text: вҷӘ This is the moment вҷӘ You gotta take it in and know that you own it вҷӘ Oh oh oh oh oh вҷӘ Bring on that feeling вҷӘ You gotta go all out, it's what you've been dreaming вҷӘ Eh eh вҷӘ еҫ…гҒЎгҒ«еҫ…гҒЈгҒҹгҒ“гҒ®зһ¬й–“гӮ’ вҷӘ дҪ•гҒҢдҪ•гҒ§гӮӮжүӢгҒ«е…ҘгӮҢгӮҲгҒҶ вҷӘ й«ҳгҒҸй«ҳгҒҸиҲһгҒ„дёҠгҒҢгӮҚгҒҶгӮҲ вҷӘ жұӮгӮҒгӮүгӮҢгҒӘгҒ„ Can't stop us now вҷӘ Woo! вҷӘ This party's got no limit вҷӘ Oh oh oh oh oh вҷӘ No limit вҷӘ This time is ours вҷӘ No limit вҷӘ Oh oh oh oh oh вҷӘ No limit вҷӘ The feeling's beginning вҷӘ We're in it, we're winning вҷӘ Break way through the sky and just go вҷӘ Yeah! вҷӘ This party's got no limit вҷӘ No limit
